common.no_orgs_message: It seems you're not part of an organization yet, join one to be able to see it here

help_menu.feedback_description: Help us improve LearnHouse by sharing your thoughts, reporting bugs, or suggesting new features.
help_menu.feedback_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

payments.title: Standard Feature
payments.description: Payments is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock payment processing and monetization features.

usergroups.title: Standard Feature
usergroups.description: User Groups is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to organize users into groups for better access management.

api_access.title: Pro Feature
api_access.description: API Access is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Pro plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock programmatic access to your organization's data.

roles.title: Pro Feature
roles.description: Creating custom roles is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Pro plan or higher. Upgrade to create roles with specific permissions.

ai.title: Standard Feature
ai.description: AI features are available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock AI-powered content creation and learning assistance.

communities.title: Standard Feature
communities.description: Communities is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock discussion communities for your members.

podcasts.title: Standard Feature
podcasts.description: Podcasts is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to create and share podcasts with your members.

audit_logs.title: Enterprise Feature
audit_logs.description: Audit logs are a premium feature available only to organizations on our Enterprise plan. Upgrade to gain full visibility into your organization's activities.

certifications.title: Pro Feature
certifications.description: Certifications is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Pro plan or higher. Upgrade to issue certificates to learners who complete your courses.

seo.title: Standard Feature
seo.description: SEO optimization tools are available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to customize search engine appearance, social sharing previews, and structured data for your courses.

sso.title: Enterprise Feature
sso.description: Single Sign-On (SSO) is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Enterprise plan. Upgrade to enable secure authentication through your organization's identity provider.

custom_domains.title: Standard Feature
custom_domains.description: Custom Domains is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to use your own domain for a branded experience.

analytics.title: Standard Feature
analytics.description: Analytics is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Standard plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock insights about your learners and content.

course_analytics.title: Pro Feature
course_analytics.description: Course Analytics is a premium feature available only to organizations on our Pro plan or higher. Upgrade to unlock detailed engagement data, enrollment trends, and learner progress for individual courses.

public.title: {{feature}} Not Available
public.description: This feature is currently not available for this organization. Please contact an administrator if you need access.

dashboard.title: {{feature}} Disabled
dashboard.description: This feature is disabled for your organization. Enable it in settings to make it available to users.

ai.title: AI Features
ai.subtitle: Configure AI capabilities for your organization
ai.enable_ai_description: Allow AI-powered features across your organization's content and learning experiences
ai.admin_only: Only administrators can modify AI settings.

sso.title: Single Sign-On (SSO)
sso.subtitle: Configure enterprise SSO for your organization
sso.workos_info: WorkOS provides enterprise SSO with support for SAML and OIDC identity providers.
sso.workos_org_id_help: This ID is automatically generated when you configure SSO through the setup portal.
sso.oidc_info: Connect directly to any OpenID Connect compatible identity provider (Azure AD, Okta, Google Workspace, Keycloak).
sso.oidc_issuer_url_help: The OIDC issuer URL. Endpoints will be auto-discovered from /.well-known/openid-configuration.
sso.oidc_client_secret_help: Keep this secret secure. It's used to authenticate with your identity provider.
sso.oidc_scopes_help: OAuth scopes to request (space-separated). Default: openid email profile
sso.enable_sso_desc: Allow users to authenticate using your organization's identity provider.
sso.allowed_domains_help: Comma-separated list of email domains allowed to login via SSO (e.g., example.com, company.org). Leave empty to allow all domains.
sso.auto_provision_desc: Automatically create user accounts for first-time SSO logins.
sso.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this SSO configuration? Users will no longer be able to log in via SSO.
sso.setup_not_available: Setup portal is not available. Please configure the provider first.
sso.setup_error: Failed to get setup portal URL

roles.title: Manage Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Roles define what users can do within your organization. Create custom roles with specific permissions for different user types.

form.description_placeholder: Describe what this role can do...

validation.name_min_length: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.description_min_length: Description must be at least 10 characters

admin.name: Admin
admin.description: Full platform control with all permissions

maintainer.name: Maintainer
maintainer.description: Can manage courses, chapters, and activities

instructor.name: Instructor
instructor.description: Can create and manage their own courses

viewer.name: Viewer
viewer.description: Read-only access to courses and content

content_creator.name: Content Creator
content_creator.description: Can create and edit content but not manage users

user_manager.name: User Manager
user_manager.description: Can manage users and user groups

moderator.name: Moderator
moderator.description: Can moderate content and manage activities

validation.name_min_length: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.description_min_length: Description must be at least 10 characters

code.title: Code

number_answer.title: Number answer
number_answer.description: Students enter a number graded with tolerance

toasts.task_save_error: Error saving task, please retry later.

general.title: Title
general.reference_file_info: Allowed formats : pdf, docx, mp4, jpg, jpeg, png, pptx, zip
general.allowed_formats: Allowed formats: pdf, docx, mp4, jpg, jpeg, png, pptx, zip
general.sign_in_required: Please sign in to upload files
general.auth_required: Authentication required. Please sign in to upload files.
general.auth_required_submit: Authentication required. Please sign in to submit your task.
general.paste_blocked: Pasting is disabled for this assignment
general.paste_blocked_hint: Pasting is disabled — type your answer directly.

short_answer.prompt_placeholder: What is the capital of Morocco?
short_answer.no_answers_error: Add at least one accepted answer before saving
short_answer.explanation_placeholder: Optional — explain why the answer is correct

number_answer.prompt_placeholder: What is the acceleration due to gravity on Earth?
number_answer.unit_hint: Shown next to the answer field. Not enforced — students only type numbers.
number_answer.explanation_placeholder: Optional — explain how to arrive at the answer

code.allow_student_run_description: Show the Run Tests button in the student view so they can try their code before submitting.
code.show_test_details_label: Show expected vs actual on failures
code.show_test_details_description: When a visible test fails, reveal the expected and received output. Turn off to prevent students from reverse-engineering the answer.
code.show_hidden_count_description: Display a badge telling students how many hidden tests exist. Turn off to keep even the count secret.
code.require_passing_description: Block the save button until every visible test passes. Useful for "must compile" gating.
code.must_pass_toast: You need to pass all visible tests before saving.
code.must_pass_hint: All visible tests must pass before you can save.
code.show_solution_description: Once the student has saved their work, show the teacher's reference solution as a collapsible panel.

feedback.label: Overall feedback
feedback.placeholder: Write a comment about the overall submission. The student will see this next to their grade.
feedback.hint: Leave this empty to keep any previous feedback unchanged.

actions.reject_description: Deletes the submission and lets the student resubmit
actions.set_final_grade_description: Calculates and saves the grade without completing the activity
actions.mark_as_done: Mark Activity as Done for User
actions.finalize_description: Sets the final grade and marks the activity as done for the student

toasts.finalize_success: Assignment graded and activity marked as complete

form.title_required: Please provide a name for your assignment
form.description_required: Please provide a description for your assignment
form.due_date_required: Please provide a due date for your assignment
form.grading_type_hint: How grades are displayed to students
form.grading_type_required: Please provide a grading type for your assignment

grading_type_descriptions.alphabet: A, B, C, D, F letter grades

form.auto_grading_description: Grade and complete the activity automatically when the student submits. Only works when every task can be graded without a human (quizzes, forms, code).
form.auto_grading_disabled_file: Automatic grading is unavailable because this assignment has a file submission task that needs human review.
form.anti_copy_paste_description: Discourage pasting AI-generated answers by blocking paste events in the code editor and text inputs. Note: this is a deterrent — tech-savvy students can bypass it.
form.show_correct_answers_description: Once the submission is graded, show students the right answers alongside their own — which quiz options were correct, the expected short or number answer, and the correct form blanks.

toasts.error_detail: An error occurred while updating the assignment

form.title_required: Please provide a name for your assignment

grading_type_descriptions.alphabet: A, B, C, D, F letter grades

form.auto_grading_description: Grade and complete the activity automatically when the student submits. Only works when every task can be graded without a human.
form.anti_copy_paste_description: Discourage pasting AI-generated answers by blocking paste events. Note: this is a deterrent — it can be bypassed.
form.show_correct_answers_description: Once graded, students see the right answers next to their own.

magic_block_content.title: Magic Block
magic_block_content.generate_description: Generate quizzes, simulations, charts and more with AI
magic_block_content.upgrade_required: Upgrade to Standard plan to generate interactive content with AI
magic_block_content.describe_prompt: Describe what interactive element you want to create:
magic_block_content.check_preview: The interactive element has been generated. Check the preview panel.
magic_block_content.max_iterations_reached: Maximum iterations reached. Save your content or start a new block.
magic_block_content.placeholder_new: Describe what you want to create...
magic_block_content.suggestion_physics_prompt: Create an interactive physics simulation showing projectile motion with adjustable angle and velocity
magic_block_content.suggestion_chart_prompt: Create an interactive bar chart with sample sales data that users can hover over to see values
magic_block_content.suggestion_quiz_prompt: Create a simple quiz game with 5 multiple choice questions about science
magic_block_content.suggestion_memory_prompt: Create a card matching memory game with colorful cards

magic_block_content.suggestion_timeline_prompt: Create an interactive timeline showing major historical events with expandable details

experience_editor.editor_features: Things you can do in the editor:

try_playgrounds.title: Interactive learning with Playgrounds

invite_users.title: Invite your team & learners
invite_users.description: Add instructors or share a link for learners to join.

customize_org.title: Customize your organization

teach_the_world.title: Learn & grow
teach_the_world.description: Resources to help you get the most out of LearnHouse.
teach_the_world.classroom_desc: Learn how to grow and manage your courses

welcome.title: Welcome to LearnHouse
welcome.subtitle: Create courses, invite learners and share knowledge with the world.
welcome.features_subtitle: All the tools to build and grow your learning platform.

features.teach_desc: Create structured courses with chapters and rich content
features.interactive_desc: Build playgrounds where learners explore at their own pace
features.community_desc: Create discussion spaces where learners help each other
features.assess_desc: Create assignments and track submissions from learners
features.collaborate_desc: Give learners shared boards to brainstorm and work together
features.voice_desc: Launch podcasts and distribute audio episodes to learners
features.certify_desc: Issue certificates when learners complete your courses
features.impact_desc: Track engagement and see how learners progress over time
features.team_desc: Invite instructors, manage roles and organize learner groups

farewell.title: You're ready to teach the world
farewell.description: Everything is set up. Your learners are waiting for something great.

upgrade_modal.title: Unlock your full potential
upgrade_modal.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches where you want to take your teaching.
upgrade_modal.current_free_limits: Free plan: 1 course · 10 members · No AI

standard.goal: Start monetizing your courses and build a learning community.

highlights.courses_desc: Create as many courses as you need — no limits on your curriculum.
highlights.members_desc: Grow your learner base and manage them in one place.
highlights.payments_desc: Sell courses and offer subscriptions to generate revenue.
highlights.communities_desc: Let learners connect, ask questions, and share ideas.
highlights.podcasts_desc: Deliver audio content and reach learners on the go.
highlights.ai_desc: Speed up content creation with AI-powered writing tools.
highlights.analytics_desc: Track progress and engagement to improve your courses.

pro.goal: Scale your academy with advanced tools and full control.

highlights.members_desc: Support larger cohorts with up to 10 admin seats.
highlights.ai_desc: More credits for high-volume content creation and assistance.
highlights.certifications_desc: Reward learners with certificates when they complete courses.
highlights.custom_domain_desc: Use your own domain for a fully branded academy.
highlights.roles_desc: Control exactly who can do what across your organization.
highlights.playgrounds_desc: Let learners experiment and practice with hands-on interactive exercises.
highlights.api_desc: Integrate with your existing tools and automate workflows.
